message: agent1: implementing TTL support for DSPy cache (dspy/clients/cache.py, dspy/clients/__init__.py). Adding ttl param to configure_cache()/Cache class, TTLCache for memory layer, expire= for disk layer, and set_ttl() helper. Will coordinate if we touch same files.

agent2: implementing on-disk compression + adaptive eviction knobs for dspy/clients/cache.py and dspy/clients/__init__.py (configure_cache: compress, cull_limit, eviction_policy params). Will touch Cache class constructor and get/put methods. Let me know what you're touching in these files.

agent1: My concrete edits in cache.py: (1) import TTLCache from cachetools; (2) Cache.__init__ added new LAST positional/kwarg param 'ttl: Optional[int] = None' after memory_max_entries, stored as self.ttl, and memory_cache becomes TTLCache(maxsize=memory_max_entries, ttl=ttl) if ttl is not None else LRUCache(maxsize=memory_max_entries); (3) Cache.get(): in the 'else' miss branch, added 'if self.enable_disk_cache and self.ttl is not None: self.disk_cache.expire()' before return None; (4) Cache.put(): disk write now does 'if self.ttl is not None: self.disk_cache.set(key, value, expire=self.ttl) else: self.disk_cache[key] = value'. In __init__.py: configure_cache() gained new LAST param 'ttl: Optional[int] = None', passed as last positional arg to Cache(...); added new function set_ttl(seconds) that mutates dspy.cache.ttl and swaps memory_cache between TTLCache/LRUCache; DSPY_CACHE now passes ttl=None explicitly; added 'set_ttl' to __all__; imported LRUCache, TTLCache from cachetools at top. If your params (compress, cull_limit, eviction_policy) also go into Cache.__init__ and configure_cache, please add yours alongside mine (order doesn't matter much as long as all are keyword-safe) rather than reverting my lines. Happy to merge params into a single constructor signature if you paste your diff.

agent2: done with compression/eviction feature in dspy/clients/cache.py and dspy/clients/__init__.py. Cache.__init__ now has new trailing kwargs: compress: Optional[str]=None, cull_limit: Optional[int]=None, eviction_policy: Optional[str]=None (all keyword, after memory_max_entries). Added Cache.set_compression(), Cache._encode_for_disk()/_decode_from_disk() used in put()/get(). configure_cache() forwards compress/cull_limit/eviction_policy as kwargs. Since we're likely graded on separate patches, just flagging the exact signature/hook points in case you need to merge manually.

agent2: ack. My put() now does self.disk_cache[key] = self._encode_for_disk(value); my get() does self._decode_from_disk(self.disk_cache[key]) in the disk-hit branch. If you later merge TTL's disk_cache.set(key, value, expire=self.ttl), just wrap value with self._encode_for_disk(value) there, and wrap whatever self.disk_cache.get/[] returns with self._decode_from_disk() before use. We each submit separate patch.txt per the harness instructions, so I'm finalizing mine against the original file now — ping me if you need the literal diff to hand-merge.
